brand.mission: Shaw rebuilds ahead of the curve.
brand.audience: Bank C-suite executives, lending operators, and conference decision-makers.
brand.voice: Quiet competence: disciplined, credible, human-centered, and never gimmicky.
differentiators: Spectrum is the central lending platform story.
Amplify, AI Advisor, and Insight extend one aligned product and campaign narrative.
Shaw product proof and real project outputs lead over abstract decoration.
brand.source: Confirmed Shaw company and portal design canon — Jul 23, 2026

relationship.mission: Connect Spectrum, Amplify, AI Advisor, and Insight into one evolving platform story.
relationship.summary: Films 1 and 2 are complete. Film 3 creative brainstorming is complete and awaits direction lock. Film 4 is planned. Films 2, 3, and 4 form one aligned Summit campaign loop.
relationship.source: Confirmed Shaw film roadmap and direct Third i instructions — Jul 23, 2026
